main_themes: Symptom vs. Problem: Mental loops are a symptom of Idolatry.
The Pitcher Analogy: Training the mind requires repetition, not just a miracle.
Sales as Service: Leading others to correct decisions based on alignment.
Economic Spiritualism: God blesses the work when the work serves His purpose.

nuggets.idea_one_liner: Stop trying to kill the thoughts; kill the idolatry and the thoughts will starve to death.
nuggets.proof_quote: Solving the problem would then stop the symptom as a byproduct.
